root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_name w2, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums,0) w3, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.latest_time w4, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num,0) w5, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.final_sheet_num,0) w6, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.notnull_sheet_num,0) w7, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.auto_sheet_num,0) w8, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.is_use_flag w9 from tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum where tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# order by tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums desc )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from ( select to_char(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_name w2, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums,0) w3, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.latest_time w4, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.accord_rule_alarm_num,0) w5, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.final_sheet_num,0) w6, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.notnull_sheet_num,0) w7, nvl(tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.auto_sheet_num,0) w8, tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.is_use_flag w9 from tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum where tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# order by tfa_alarm_sheetsendrule_a_sum.sendrule_effective_nums desc )
